parameters.name: field
parameters.label: Field Component
parameters.description: Specifies a to use as the source of the text. The font and style of the text displayed in the Field are set using the parameters in the Text .

parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: DAT
parameters.description: Specifies a to use for the source of the text. Drag and Drop a onto this field, or manually enter the 's path.

parameters.name: rowindex
parameters.label: DAT Row
parameters.description: The row number (starting from 0) of the cell, if the is a table.

parameters.name: colindex
parameters.label: DAT Col
parameters.description: The column number of the cell, if the is a table.

parameters.name: specdat
parameters.label: Specification DAT
parameters.description: A that allows you to specify and position text by pixel, with the lower left corner being at 0, 0.  Column headers must include or , or , and .  A sample table can be:

parameters.name: text
parameters.label: Text
parameters.description: A string of text. It optionally can be followed by a numeric value and another post-string, as set with and below. If newlines or tabs are desired, the recommended way is to change this parameter to e

parameters.name: legacyparsing
parameters.label: Legacy Parsing
parameters.description: In older builds the syntax \XXX (E.g \200 would be character 200), \t, \n as well as [] and {} (to position strings) was parsed in the string. This is now deprecated. For specifying characters codes,

parameters.name: appendvalue
parameters.label: Append Value
parameters.description: Enables the field defined below. This value is inserted between the string and the string.

parameters.name: valuetouse
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: The numeric value to display.

parameters.name: totaldigits
parameters.label: Total Digits
parameters.description: The total number of digits in the value displayed.

parameters.name: decimaldigits
parameters.label: Decimal Digits
parameters.description: The number of digits displayed after the decimal place.

parameters.name: posttext
parameters.label: Post Text
parameters.description: The text string appended after Text and Value (if present).

parameters.name: chopvaluereplace
parameters.label: CHOP Value %-Replace
parameters.description: Allows portions of the strings to be replaced by values via a syntax similar to C-style printf()/sprintf(). More details of the syntax are provided in the next parameter, ' ' .

parameters.name: chop
parameters.label: CHOP
parameters.description: The containing all the values to insert in the strings. The Text will repeat the Text string until all channels are displayed. They are displayed by using a special syntax in your string, defined as s

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: When checked text is automatically line wrapped so it doesn't extend outside the 's borders.  When using Word Wrap and Auto-Size together, the text will first word-wrap based on the specified font siz

parameters.name: font
parameters.label: Font
parameters.description: Select the font for the text from this drop down menu. All fonts are provided by Windows, any font that is loaded into Windows can be used.

parameters.name: fontfile
parameters.label: Font File
parameters.description: Specify any TrueType font file ( ) to use for the text.  When using a font file, the Font menu above is disabled.

parameters.name: dispmethod
parameters.label: Display Method
parameters.description: The display method used.

parameters.name: antialias
parameters.label: Anti-Alias
parameters.description: Smoothes out the edges of the text. Not available for Texture Display Mode.

parameters.name: strokewidth
parameters.label: Stroke Width
parameters.description: Controls the width of the outline when using Stroke Display Method.

parameters.name: bold
parameters.label: Bold
parameters.description: Displays the text in .

parameters.name: italic
parameters.label: Italic
parameters.description: Displays the text in

parameters.name: fontautosize
parameters.label: Auto-Size Font
parameters.description: Automatically controls font size using one of the following 3 options. When using this feature along with Word Wrap turned on, it will first word-wrap the text based on the specified font size, then a

parameters.name: fontsizex
parameters.label: Font Size X
parameters.description: Sets the font size in X (horizontal). Floating point font sizes are permissable when using

parameters.name: fontsizexunit
parameters.label: Font Size X Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction, Fraction Aspect or Points (font point size).	A Point is defined using the Windows conventions for 100% scaling, which is 96 pixels to 72 poin

parameters.name: fontsizey
parameters.label: Font Size Y
parameters.description: Sets the font size in Y (vertical). Floating point font sizes are permissable when using

parameters.name: fontsizeyunit
parameters.label: Font Size Y Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction, Fraction Aspect or Points (font point size).

parameters.name: keepfontratio
parameters.label: Keep Font Ratio
parameters.description: Ignores Y value in Font Size. Sets both X and Y size to X.

parameters.name: breaklang
parameters.label: Break Language
parameters.description: Language type hint to help format the glyphs correctly.

parameters.name: readingdirection
parameters.label: Reading Direction
parameters.description: Use to set whether the language reads Left to Right or Right to Left.

parameters.name: positionunit
parameters.label: Position Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: linespacing
parameters.label: Line Spacing
parameters.description: Determines the amount of space between lines of text.

parameters.name: linespacingunit
parameters.label: Line Spacing Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: alignx
parameters.label: Horizontal Align
parameters.description: Sets the horizontal alignment.

parameters.name: alignxmode
parameters.label: Horizontal Align Mode
parameters.description: Determines how horizontal alignment is calculated.

parameters.name: aligny
parameters.label: Vertical Align
parameters.description: Sets the vertical alignment.

parameters.name: alignymode
parameters.label: Vertical Align Mode
parameters.description: Determines how vertical alignment is calculated.

parameters.name: fontalpha
parameters.label: Font Alpha
parameters.description: Set the alpha value for the font.

parameters.name: bgalpha
parameters.label: Background Alpha
parameters.description: Set the alpha value for the background.

parameters.name: borderaalpha
parameters.label: Border A Alpha
parameters.description: Set the alpha value for border A.

parameters.name: borderbalpha
parameters.label: Border B Alpha
parameters.description: Set the alpha value for border B.

parameters.name: leftborder
parameters.label: Left Border
parameters.description: What color the 2 left-most pixels are. Options are 0 (no change), Border A (uses color defined in Border A), or Border B (uses color defined in Border B).

parameters.name: leftborderi
parameters.label: Left Border Inside
parameters.description: Same as above parameter but used for an inside border.

parameters.name: rightborder
parameters.label: Right Border
parameters.description: What color the 2 right-most pixels are. Options are 0 (no change), Border A (uses color defined in Border A), or Border B (uses color defined in Border B).

parameters.name: rightborderi
parameters.label: Right Border Inside
parameters.description: Same as above parameter but used for an inside border.

parameters.name: bottomborder
parameters.label: Bottom Border
parameters.description: What color the 2 bottom-most pixels are. Options are 0 (no change), Border A (uses color defined in Border A), or Border B (uses color defined in Border B).

parameters.name: bottomborderi
parameters.label: Bottom Border Inside
parameters.description: Same as above parameter but used for an inside border.

parameters.name: topborder
parameters.label: Top Border
parameters.description: What color the 2 top-most pixels are. Options are 0 (no change), Border A (uses color defined in Border A), or Border B (uses color defined in Border B).

parameters.name: topborderi
parameters.label: Top Border Inside
parameters.description: Same as above parameter but used for an inside border.

parameters.name: operand
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose which composite operation is performed from this menu. Search the web for 'blend modes' for more detailed information on the effects of each type.

parameters.name: swaporder
parameters.label: Swap Order
parameters.description: Swaps the order of the composite with the input.

parameters.name: fontcolorb
parameters.label: Fontcolorb
parameters.description: RGBA values for the text displayed. (default: white (1,1,1,1))

parameters.name: combineinput
parameters.label: Combineinput
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: typeface
parameters.label: Typeface
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bgcolorb
parameters.label: Bgcolorb
parameters.description: RGBA values for the background. (default: black (0,0,0,0))

parameters.name: trackingy
parameters.label: Trackingy
parameters.description: The amount of space to add between letters in X and Y. Tracking is way of adding an arbitrary offset between letters. There already is a default offset associated with each font so the letters are flu

parameters.name: borderspace2
parameters.label: Borderspace2
parameters.description: When using Auto-Size Font, it will further shrink the text to give it a border.

parameters.name: smartpunct
parameters.label: Smartpunct
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: leadingzero
parameters.label: Leadingzero
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: borderab
parameters.label: Borderab
parameters.description: RGBA values for border A color.

parameters.name: premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.label: Premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: legacyfontselection
parameters.label: Legacyfontselection
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: positiony
parameters.label: Positiony
parameters.description: The starting position of the text in X and Y.  TIP: Inside the Text and Post Text fields the position can be overridden by using brackets.  [x,y] - "bleh[x,y]newtext" will place newtext at position (x

parameters.name: borderbb
parameters.label: Borderbb
parameters.description: RGBA values for border B color.
